title: CRREM Carbon Pathway Assessment
description: Data schema for the CRREM Carbon Pathway Assessment report template. Used by the crrem skill and tcfd-reporting skill for carbon pathway benchmarking and climate disclosure.

property.description: Physical and classification attributes of the asset.

gfa_m2.description: Gross floor area in square metres.

performance.description: Measured energy and carbon performance for the most recent full year.

actual_eui_kwh_m2yr.description: Actual energy use intensity in kWh/m²/yr.

fuel_mix.description: Percentage breakdown of energy sources (must sum to 100).

other_pct.description: Covers district heat, oil, biomass, etc.

pathway.description: CRREM decarbonization pathway targets and stranding analysis.

target_2025.description: CRREM pathway target for 2025 in kgCO₂/m²/yr.

target_2030.description: CRREM pathway target for 2030 in kgCO₂/m²/yr.

target_2035.description: CRREM pathway target for 2035 in kgCO₂/m²/yr.

target_2040.description: CRREM pathway target for 2040 in kgCO₂/m²/yr.

target_2050.description: CRREM pathway target for 2050 in kgCO₂/m²/yr (net-zero).

stranding_year.description: Year the asset crosses above the CRREM pathway (becomes stranded). Null if currently pathway-aligned.

current_gap_pct.description: Percentage by which actual carbon intensity exceeds the current-year pathway target. Negative value means the asset is below target (aligned).

pathway_name.description: Climate scenario underpinning the CRREM pathway.

trajectory.description: Year-by-year trajectory data used to draw the pathway chart and populate the pathway table.

actual_kgco2_m2.description: Actual (or projected) carbon intensity for this year in kgCO₂/m²/yr.

pathway_target_kgco2_m2.description: CRREM pathway target for this year in kgCO₂/m²/yr.

gap_kgco2_m2.description: Difference: actual minus pathway target. Positive = above target (worse); negative = below target (better).

status.description: 'aligned' = below pathway; 'at-risk' = within 10% above; 'stranded' = more than 10% above pathway.

emission_factors.description: Grid and fuel emission factors used to calculate carbon intensity.

electricity_kgco2_kwh.description: Grid electricity emission factor in kgCO₂/kWh.

gas_kgco2_kwh.description: Natural gas emission factor in kgCO₂/kWh.

other_kgco2_kwh.description: Emission factor for other fuels (district heat, oil, etc.) in kgCO₂/kWh. Optional.

year.description: Reference year for these emission factors.

source.description: Data source citation (e.g. 'US EPA eGRID 2023', 'BEIS UK 2023').

recommendations.description: Ranked decarbonization recommendations with carbon impact and cost guidance.

rank.description: Priority rank (1 = highest impact or urgency).

title.description: Short measure title (e.g. 'Heat Pump Conversion', 'LED Retrofit').

action.description: One- or two-sentence description of the specific action required.

carbon_reduction_pct.description: Estimated percentage reduction in total building carbon intensity if this measure is implemented.

tcfd_context.description: Optional TCFD-aligned climate risk context. Include when preparing climate disclosures or TCFD-aligned reporting.

physical_risk_score.description: Qualitative or scored physical climate risk level (e.g. 'Low', 'Medium', 'High', or '3.2/5').

transition_risk_level.description: Transition risk level based on regulatory exposure, carbon pricing, and stranding proximity.

scenario_1_5c_impact.description: Qualitative or quantitative description of asset impact under a 1.5°C warming scenario.

scenario_2c_impact.description: Qualitative or quantitative description of asset impact under a 2°C warming scenario.

governance_notes.description: Notes on climate governance, board oversight, or management accountability relevant to this asset.

prepared_by.description: Name of the firm or individual preparing this report.

prepared_for.description: Name of the client or organization receiving this report.
